headline: Built for Clari
subheadline: AI-powered sales infrastructure to optimize revenue operations and integrate post-acquisition systems for global expansion

challenges.title: Talent Retention
challenges.desc: Clari faces a 15.1% year-over-year employee decrease, impacting team stability during international growth. This requires focused recruitment strategies to maintain expertise in AI-driven revenue operations. It complicates scaling efforts across 9 countries.

challenges.title: System Integration
challenges.desc: After acquiring Salesloft, Clari must merge platforms to create a unified revenue system. This involves handling unstructured data signals and ensuring seamless AI capabilities. Poor integration could disrupt productivity for revenue teams.

challenges.title: Global Operations
challenges.desc: Managing operations in 9 countries demands localized sales infrastructure. Cultural and regulatory differences add complexity to AI implementations. This affects the ability to predict and orchestrate revenue effectively worldwide.

challenges.title: Revenue Predictability
challenges.desc: Clari's revenue teams deal with vast datasets from structured and unstructured sources. Inaccurate predictions hinder growth acceleration. The recent acquisition amplifies the need for reliable AI tools to boost productivity.

deliverables.title: Revenue Orchestration System
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI framework to unify Clari's revenue data and predictions, integrating with existing tools like Salesloft for end-to-end operations

deliverables.title: Talent Management Platform
deliverables.desc: Develops a system to address employee retention by streamlining recruitment and training, linking with Clari's global HR processes for better team stability

deliverables.title: Post-Acquisition Integrator
deliverables.desc: Creates connectors to merge Salesloft data into Clari's core systems, enhancing AI-driven productivity across revenue teams

deliverables.title: International Expansion Framework
deliverables.desc: Establishes scalable sales infrastructure for Clari's 9-country operations, incorporating localized AI adaptations for better market penetration

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Conduct in-depth review of Clari's current revenue systems and challenges, including post-acquisition integration needs

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop customized AI infrastructure blueprints and begin integration with existing tools

engagementSteps.title: Implementation and Review
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Roll out the new systems, test for global compatibility, and refine based on initial performance metrics

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to automate and optimize revenue operations for B2B SaaS companies like Clari.

faqItems.question: How does this integrate with existing systems?
faqItems.answer: The infrastructure connects seamlessly with tools like Salesloft to enhance data flow and predictions.

faqItems.question: Is this tailored for global operations?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it addresses challenges in Clari's 9-country setup for better international revenue management.

faqItems.question: What about data security?
faqItems.answer: All integrations follow industry standards to protect Clari's sensitive revenue data.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: The initial phase covers three months, with options for ongoing support.

faqItems.question: Can this help with employee retention?
faqItems.answer: It includes features to streamline recruitment and training, targeting Clari's talent challenges.

stackItems.name: Clari Platform
stackItems.role: Manages revenue operations and AI predictions

stackItems.name: Salesloft
stackItems.role: Handles sales engagement and integrates post-acquisition data

stackItems.name: Sequoia Tools
stackItems.role: Supports funding and growth strategies from investor platforms

stackItems.name: AI Frameworks
stackItems.role: Processes structured and unstructured data for revenue forecasting

stackItems.name: HR Systems
stackItems.role: Streamlines recruitment and employee management for global teams
